best_next_exact_boundary.boundary: WRF first_rk_step_part2 internals: emit after calculate_phy_tend, after update_phy_ten, and after conv_t_tendf_to_moist for the theta source leaves feeding T_TENDF. Include the raw RTH*TEN/T_HIST_SRC contributors and the current JAX dry physics source bundle.
best_next_exact_boundary.secondary_boundary: After T_TENDF is fixed, add an exact WRF post-rk_tendency/post-relax_bdy_dry/post-rk_addtend_dry/post-spec_bdy_dry split for T_TEND/PH_TEND/RW_TEND, or compare source-save PH/RW against the JAX acoustic-stage assembly rather than _augment alone.
best_next_exact_boundary.why: The earliest full-domain material field after patched init is T_TENDF at after_first_rk_step_part2. Source-save confirms it is already nonzero before rk_addtend_dry/boundary/spec/acoustic. A source edit in _augment or boundary code would be later than the first failure.

augment_boundary_explains_PH_RW.evidence: JAX _augment_large_step_tendencies does not assemble the WRF large-step PH_TEND/RW_TEND contract; the current code assembles those leaves in acoustic setup. Compare source-save patch metrics against the acoustic-stage candidate before source-editing _augment.

boundary_or_spec_only.evidence: WRF source-save after rk_tendency is before relax_bdy_dry, rk_addtend_dry, spec_bdy_dry, small_step_prep, and acoustic updates, yet T_TENDF is already nonzero and differs from JAX.

rad_rk_tendf_1.interpretation: Proof-local rad_rk_tendf=1 does not close WRF Step-1 T_TENDF because this step does not run radiation cadence and the held radiation leaf is not the missing current-step source bundle.

raw_advection_explains_T_TENDF.evidence: T_TENDF is a WRF fixed-source leaf produced by first_rk_step_part2/update_phy_ten before rk_addtend. It is not produced by compute_advection_tendencies or _augment_large_step_tendencies.

metadata.wrf_reference: dyn_em/start_em.F (AL/ALT + p from calc_p_rho_phi equations; press_adj); dyn_em/module_bc_em.F::set_w_surface

ranked_hypotheses.evidence: Patched-init state fields are below material gates, but after_first_rk_step_part2 T_TENDF and source-save pre-addtend T_TENDF remain materially different from JAX dry tendencies.
ranked_hypotheses.hypothesis: Missing or incorrectly routed WRF first_rk_step_part2 fixed source leaves, first visible as T_TENDF.

ranked_hypotheses.evidence: The full after_rk_addtend WRF surface is after relax/rk_addtend/spec, while JAX _augment is pre-acoustic and does not own PH/RW assembly. The sparse source-save boundary is the cleaner pre-addtend falsifier.
ranked_hypotheses.hypothesis: WRF/JAX PH_TEND and RW_TEND are being compared across different stage boundaries.

ranked_hypotheses.evidence: rad_rk_tendf=1 leaves Step-1 T_TENDF materially unchanged under the current cadence.
ranked_hypotheses.hypothesis: A proof-local rad_rk_tendf switch closes T_TENDF.

ranked_hypotheses.evidence: T_TENDF differs at source-save after rk_tendency before boundary/spec/addtend mutations.
ranked_hypotheses.hypothesis: Boundary relaxation or spec_bdy_dry is the first T_TENDF cause.

ranked_hypotheses.evidence: Patched-init P_STATE remains below the 1 Pa material gate in the predecessor proof.
ranked_hypotheses.hypothesis: The already closed stale RK1 P_STATE loader is still causal.

unresolved_risks: The source-save hook is patch-only, so PH/RW source-save metrics are sparse falsifiers; full-domain conclusions use the full WRF surfaces.
The full WRF after_rk_addtend surface is after relax_bdy_dry/rk_addtend_dry/spec_bdy_dry, while JAX _augment is not an exact post-spec boundary.
No production source edit was made because the first exact failure is inside WRF first_rk_step_part2 source-leaf construction, not a proven narrow JAX source line.
